decision_implications: vLLM's sm80 attention backend is not simply FlashMLA; it is FlashMLA sparse metadata/cache format plus sm80 reference gather/dequant and Triton split-K decode.
The largest backend mismatch is cache precision/layout: mini exact bf16 flat vs vLLM packed fp8_ds_mla + FP8 indexer cache.
A fair microbench must pair mini bf16 direct sparse attention with vLLM gather/dequant+split-K, not only vLLM's split-K core.
Any direct vLLM cache/indexer port would be a precision/cache experiment, not an exact default optimization.

frontend_qkv_cache.dispatch: q_kv_norm_rope_cache_fallback -> Triton q_kv_norm_rope_cache_bf16 when MINISGL_DSV4_SM80_FUSED_Q_KV_NORM_ROPE_STORE and sm80/triton are enabled; otherwise torch fallback pieces.

sparse_decode.dispatch: DSV4AttentionBackend._sparse_attention_two_source calls mini JIT/CUDA dsv4_sparse_attention_two_source_bf16 when MINISGL_DSV4_SM80_SPARSE_ATTN_BF16 is enabled on sm80.
sparse_decode.input_boundary: q bf16 [T, local_heads=8, 512], SWA bf16 cache, optional C4/C128 bf16 compressed cache, int32 flat indices/lens.
sparse_decode.not_same_as_vllm: This kernel reads bf16 cache directly; vLLM sm80 first gathers/dequantizes packed fp8_ds_mla cache into a bf16 gathered buffer.
sources: python/minisgl/kernel/csrc/jit/dsv4_sparse_attention_two_source_bf16.cu:2: * DeepSeek V4 sm80 two-source sparse attention.

cache.compressed: C4/C128 component caches [layers, slots, 512] bf16; store path compress_norm_rope_store_fallback -> Triton compress_norm_rope_store_bf16/store_cache when enabled.
cache.indexer: C4 indexer cache [layers, slots, 128] bf16; store path applies hadamard then bf16 store.
cache.layout: DSV4CacheLayoutPolicy bf16_flat for SWA/C4/C128/indexer plus bf16 compressor state rings.
cache.swa: _swa_buffer [layers, pages, page_size, 512] bf16; q/kv norm+RoPE store can run in graph.

graph_runtime.attention_metadata: DSV4AttentionBackend prepares decode metadata, then copies page tables, sparse indices/lens, and compressed loc buffers before graph replay.
graph_runtime.graph_capture: mini GraphRunner captures/replays selected batch sizes and binds input_ids/out_loc/positions to graph buffers.
graph_runtime.known_profile_signal: Post-Marlin rank0 4096/128 profile showed large runtime/copy/metadata event count beside GPU sparse attention/indexer kernels.

indexer.cache_layout: bf16 flat indexer cache, one 128-wide row per C4-compressed slot.
indexer.dispatch: DSV4AttentionBackend.select_indexer calls indexer_select_bf16_fallback, which dispatches Triton indexer_bf16_logits + topk_transform_512 when enabled; otherwise torch logits/topk.
indexer.query_boundary: bf16 indexer q [T, 64, 128] + fp32/folded weights; topk width 512, ratio 4.

precision_contract.moe_weights: MXFP4 weights with mini-owned Marlin WNA16 expert backend
precision_contract.not_default: Do not silently switch exact default to vLLM deepseek_v4_fp8.

paired_alignment.alignment: semantic boundary matches, dtype/layout does not.
paired_alignment.mini: bf16 fused q/KV norm+RoPE+SWA cache write where enabled; compressed/indexer stores remain bf16.
paired_alignment.portability: direct port would change cache precision/layout; exact mini needs bf16 adaptation or separate opt-in precision target.
paired_alignment.vllm: custom op boundary quant-inserts packed fp8_ds_mla SWA cache; compressor/indexer cache insert is also quantized.

paired_alignment.alignment: not same microbench boundary; vLLM splits gather/layout from attention math.
paired_alignment.mini: single two-source bf16 cache sparse attention kernel reads SWA plus C4/C128 cache by int32 indices.
paired_alignment.portability: adapt gather/mask/split-K design for bf16 exact path, or direct-port only under fp8_ds_mla cache target.
paired_alignment.vllm: compute global topk, gather/dequant fp8 cache to merged bf16 [T,total_topk,512] + invalid mask, then split-K sparse attention core.

paired_alignment.alignment: same algorithmic role, different q/cache precision and op partitioning.
paired_alignment.mini: bf16 q/cache logits + topk transform, width 512, ratio 4.
paired_alignment.portability: direct port is precision-changing; exact path may borrow global-index/topk buffer discipline.
paired_alignment.vllm: fused indexer Q RoPE+FP8 quant/weight fold, FP8 paged MQA logits over uint8 indexer cache, persistent_topk.

paired_alignment.alignment: layout mismatch is central, not incidental.
paired_alignment.mini: bf16 flat SWA/C4/C128/indexer caches plus bf16 compressor state rings.
paired_alignment.portability: new precision/cache target if this is chosen as the main route.
paired_alignment.vllm: byte-packed fp8_ds_mla KV cache and FP8 indexer cache; block/page metadata owned by vLLM attention backends.

paired_alignment.alignment: graph sizes overlap [1,2,4], buffer ownership differs.
paired_alignment.mini: GraphRunner replays captured graphs but attention metadata copies remain visible around replay.
paired_alignment.portability: optimize mini exact metadata/runtime after attention/indexer boundary is matched.
paired_alignment.vllm: CudagraphDispatcher, persistent backend buffers, graph capture stream, graph-aware custom all-reduce and pinned output copies.

backend_class.name: DeepseekV4FlashMLASparseBackend / V4_FLASHMLA_SPARSE
backend_class.sm80_reality: Backend class is FlashMLA sparse, but FlashMLA sparse kernels only support compute capability 9/10; on sm80 use_dsv4_reference_kernels routes decode to reference gather/dequant + Triton split-K attention.

custom_op_boundary.dispatch: DeepseekV4MultiHeadLatentAttentionWrapper.forward calls torch.ops.vllm.deepseek_v4_attention; the registered Python impl performs qnorm/RoPE/KV insert, indexer/compressor scheduling, and sparse MLA attention.

sm80_decode_pipeline.dispatch: gather_dequant_two_scopes_with_mask one/two Triton launches over packed fp8_ds_mla cache -> _dsv4_sm80_sparse_attn_decode_triton split-K sparse attention core.

cache.cache_insert: SWA insert uses fused_deepseek_v4_qnorm_rope_kv_rope_quant_insert; compressor/cache paths use deepseek_v4_compressor_sparse_sm80/indexer_sm80 custom ops.
cache.compressed_cache: MLAAttentionSpec dtype uint8, head_size 512, alignment 576, model_version deepseek_v4.
cache.kv_cache_dtype: fp8_ds_mla uint8 packed cache; attention code canonicalizes auto/fp8 to fp8_ds_mla and asserts fp8.
sources: vllm/model_executor/layers/deepseek_v4_attention.py:1163: logger.info_once("Using DeepSeek's fp8_ds_mla KV cache format.")
cache.swa_cache: DeepseekV4SWACache dtype uint8, internal block size 64, preferred kernel block size 256; each token is 584 bytes in DeepSeek V4 layout.

graph_runtime.custom_all_reduce: Custom all-reduce registers graph buffer addresses and switches behavior when graph capturing.
graph_runtime.graph_capture: vLLM V1 GPUModelRunner uses CudagraphDispatcher and parallel_state.graph_capture on a separate stream; graph sizes in 07.392 logs were [1,2,4].
graph_runtime.persistent_buffers: Runner preallocates graph input/metadata buffers, sampling pinned CPU outputs, and backend-specific decode buffers.
sources: vllm/distributed/parallel_state.py:465: def graph_capture(self, graph_capture_context: GraphCaptureContext | None = None):
vllm/distributed/device_communicators/custom_all_reduce.py:202: `register_graph_buffers` call at the end of the context.
graph_runtime.streams: DeepseekV4Model creates AuxStreamType.Attention; maybe_execute_in_parallel overlaps C4 indexer work on current stream with KV insert/compressor work on aux stream.

indexer.cache: FP8 indexer cache on sm80, uint8 rows with 128 fp8 values plus 4 bytes of scales (head dim 132); FP4 indexer cache is SM100-only.
indexer.op_pipeline: DeepseekV4Indexer.forward -> fused_indexer_q_rope_quant -> SparseAttnIndexer custom op; on sm80 SparseAttnIndexer uses fp8_paged_mqa_logits_triton and persistent_topk/top_k_per_row_decode.

model_quantization.sm80_moe: Mxfp4MoEMethod/Marlin family for MoE, but non-MoE activations/cache use DeepSeek V4 FP8 policy.
